data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Design follows Hick’s Law to simplify and quicken user decision-making.
data.technical_spec: Offers limited and clear options in navigation and layout to reduce cognitive load.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Interface elements are designed considering ease of access and interaction speed.
data.technical_spec: Strategically placed clickable elements to enable quick mouse or touch actions.

data.title: Law of Simplicity
data.description: The interface maintains simplicity to enhance user comprehension and task completion.
data.technical_spec: Uses clean design lines and minimalist visual elements to focus user attention.

data.title: Feedback Principle
data.description: Provides immediate feedback to user actions ensuring a responsive interface.
data.technical_spec: Incorporates loading indicators, confirmations, and error messages effectively.

data.title: Consistency Principle
data.description: Ensures a consistent look and feel across all pages and services.
data.technical_spec: Uses consistent styling guidelines and component libraries throughout the site.
